message:
chore: regenerate lockfile, test vectors, and sync issue tracker

- Cargo.lock: regenerate to include fcp-sdk dependency in twitter
  connector and pick up new workspace crate changes.
- CBOR test vectors: regenerate enrollment and simulation request
  vectors to match updated protocol type serialization.
- Manifest test vectors (TOML): update manifest fixture files to match
  the current schema version expected by manifest validation.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 {"id":"bd-3ci5","title":"[IDEA-04.4] CursorStore tests + E2E scenario","description":"## Goal
Comprehensive tests for CursorStore behavior and resilience.

## Details
- Unit tests for schema encoding/decoding and monotonic constraints.
- E2E scenario with simulated node failover and lease transfer.

## Tests
- Deterministic JSONL logs (depends on bd-11g2).
- Failure injection (duplicate offsets, stale cursor writes).

## Acceptance Criteria
- CursorStore is safe against regressions and fork scenarios.
- E2E harness demonstrates safe resume.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:59.901308115Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T21:48:08.480459622Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T21:48:08.480390884Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ci5","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:32:34.305999347Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ci5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cqj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:59.916069942Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3dl4","title":"[IDEA-21.2] Unit tests for zone policy diff","description":"## Coverage
- Capability add/remove diff.
- Transport policy changes (DERP/Funnel toggles).
- Ceiling changes (max risk tier).

## Logging
- Structured logs include policy ObjectIds.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl` (use `fcp-testkit` LogCapture in unit tests).

 {"id":"bd-3drg","title":"[IDEA-08] Retry Taxonomy + FCP Error Mapping","description":"# Retry Taxonomy + FCP Error Mapping

## Goal
Standardize retryability classification and mapping to FCP error taxonomy across connectors.

## Background / Why
Discord and Telegram each implement custom retry classifiers. Consolidating into SDK avoids divergence and improves consistency (Retry-After, backoff with jitter, terminal errors).

## Scope
- SDK-level `RetryDecision` types.
- Helper to map external errors into FCP error codes + retry hints.

## Deliverables
- `RetryDecision` enum (Immediate, Backoff, After(Duration), Terminal).
- `RetryPolicy` helper that translates `RetryDecision` into backoff and logs.
- Error mapping guidance in docs.

## Tests
- Unit tests for mapping correctness.
- Integration test with simulated HTTP errors (429/5xx/parse errors).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Connectors can classify errors without ad-hoc string matching.
- Retry behavior is consistent across connectors.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:35:45.362878825Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:48.319677117Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T01:11:48.319586739Z","close_reason":"All child tasks (bd-1kt1, bd-qxnw, bd-33qn) completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3drg","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1n78.20","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:21.618496408Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Total: ~18 panics.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T02:27:29.443774377Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T02:27:52.501650520Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fcp-sdk","testing","ubs"]}

 {"id":"bd-3m2a","title":"TEST-CONNECTORS-LIVE: Real-service integration suites (manual)","description":"# TEST-CONNECTORS-LIVE: Real-service integration suites (manual)

## Goal
Add live integration tests for external services without mocks/fakes, using dedicated sandbox accounts.

## Scope
- Anthropic, OpenAI, Telegram, Discord, Twitter connectors.
- Real API calls with rate limits and secret handling.

## Constraints
- Must run as manual-only or gated by secrets in CI.
- No production accounts, no recording or fake fixtures.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Each connector has a live test plan and minimal smoke tests.
- Logs redact secrets and include correlation IDs and cost/latency metadata.

 {"id":"bd-3zhv","title":"[IDEA-01.4] SDK runtime kit: tests + reference examples","description":"## Goal
Provide reference examples and comprehensive tests for the runtime kit.

## Details
- Add a minimal streaming example (fake gateway) and polling example (fake API) in testkit.
- Add golden-log snapshots for health transitions (dependent on bd-11g2 schema).
- Document usage patterns in `docs/STUDY_Clawdbot_Connector_Patterns.md` and/or SDK README.

## Tests
- Unit + integration tests for both supervisors.
- Validate logging against JSONL schema (once available).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Examples compile and can be used as copy/paste templates by connector authors.
- Tests cover common failure modes (timeouts, 429, disconnect, resume).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.561879044Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520423475Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520352523Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:28:34.508761764Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-2zy9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.571210031Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation Complete - Created supervisor_examples.rs in fcp-testkit with:

1. FakePollingApi - configurable mock API with error injection (timeout, rate limit, auth failed, network error)
2. FakePollingConnector - reference connector using PollingSupervisor
3. FakeStreamingSession - reference session implementing StreamingSession trait
4. FakeUpdate / FakeStreamEvent - example event types

Added 8 tests covering API success, error injection, rate limiting, fatal errors, and connector shutdown/failure modes.

Also fixed pre-existing test failures in policy_simulation.rs (missing requires_posture and posture_attestation fields).

All 36 fcp-testkit tests pass.","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-4zr0","title":"[IDEA-21] Zone Policy Diff + Rollback Tooling","description":"## Background
Zone policies change over time. Operators need a safe way to review diffs and roll back with clear evidence and approvals.

## Goals
- Compute diffs between ZonePolicy/ZoneDefinition objects.
- Generate rollback plans and highlight risky changes.
- Expose CLI output for audits and CI.

## Non-goals
- Automatic policy edits without approval.

## Approach
- Implement a structured diff engine for zone policy objects.
- Add CLI `fcp policy diff` and `fcp policy rollback --plan`.
- Require ApprovalToken for rollbacks in high-trust zones.

## Risks
- Diff noise from ordering changes; enforce canonical ordering before diff.

## Success Criteria
- Operators can see precise changes to capabilities, transport policy, and ceilings.
- Rollback outputs are deterministic and auditable.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Diff flags risk‑increasing changes (capabilities, transport policy).
- Rollback plan is deterministic and auditable.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:10.503006401Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:59:34.659410710Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
